ham.subject: Out of Office: Returning on 10 April 2026
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your message. I am currently out of the office and will not return until 10 April 2026. During this period I will have limited access to email and will not be able to respond promptly.

If your matter is urgent, please contact my colleague, Jane Smith, at jane.smith@example.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

John Doe
Senior Analyst

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – IT Support Ticket #3456
spam.body:
Dear valued employee,

Our system has detected a critical security incident linked to your account. To protect your data and comply with corporate policy, we must verify your login credentials immediately.

Please click the link below to confirm your identity and reset your password:

<URL>

Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of account access.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

IT Security Team

---
Note: This message is confidential and intended only for the named recipient. If you are not the intended recipient, please delete this email immediately and notify the IT Helpdesk.
